languages.subtitle: A ma'iti i te reo e faaohipahia i roto i te faanahoraa.
languages.noResults: Aita e reo e tu'ati i ta outou ma'imiraa.

phone.label: Numera niuniu
phone.selectCountry: A ma'iti i te fenua e aore râ, i te tuhaa fenua
phone.searchCountry: A imi i te fenua, te numera e aore râ, te reni niuniu
phone.noCountries: Aita e fenua e tu'ati i ta outou ma'imiraa.
phone.countryButton: A taui i te fenua, i teie nei %{country} e %{callingCode}
phone.required: A papa'i i te hoê numera niuniu.
phone.tooShort: E mea poto roa teie numera niuniu.
phone.tooLong: E mea roa roa teie numera niuniu.
phone.invalid: A papa'i i te hoê numera niuniu mana no te fenua i ma'itihia.
phone.valid: Numera niuniu mana na te ao atoa nei

auth.onboardingTagline: Te hoê hoa paruru no te mau taime i ropu i te parau « E mea maitai au » e « Te hinaaro nei au i te tauturu ».
auth.createAccount: A hamani i te hoê parau
auth.continueOnboarding: A tamau noa i te faaôraa
auth.createSubtitle: A ma'iti i te hoê rave'a no te paruru i ta outou hoho'a parururaa.
auth.phoneVerification: Hi'opo'araa na roto i te niuniu
auth.invalidCode: A papa'i i te numera hi'opo'araa.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia faahope roa i te tomoraa i roto. A hi'opo'a i to outou tuatiraa e a tamata faahou.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Te tomoraa i roto aita e roaa
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Te faaohiparaa i te hoê tuhaa haapiiraa no te faatupuraa i te fenua. Te ohipa nei te Native Google Sign-In i roto i te hoê paturaa paturaa.
auth.northStarSubtitle: A apiti i teie nei e aore râ, a tamau noa e a tuu i te reira i muri a'e.
auth.northStarBody: E nehenehe te VL01 e faaara i te mau taheraa parururaa na roto i te mau pataraa e te mau tape'araa maoro.
auth.setupJewelry: A faaineine i te mau piru
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: To outou hoa paruru mărû i ni'a i te hoho'a fenua e i roto i te mau niuniu.
auth.capybearBody: E nehenehe ta Capybear e tauturu i te fare, te huru tia'i, te rave'a rû, te mau piiraa otoheraa, e te tautururaa i te reo.
auth.chooseVoice: A ma'iti i te hoê reo
auth.remindersReady: Ua ineine te mau faahaamana'oraa mǎrû.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Faaohipahia no te hoho'a fenua, te mau vahi atâta, te tapaeraa papû e te SOS.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving ani oia i te vahi ia nehenehe i te mau tia'i ia taa i hea e hinaarohia ai te tauturu. E nehenehe ta outou e taui i te reira i muri a'e i roto i te Settings.
permissions.notificationsTitle: Te mau faaararaa no te parururaa
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: E tauturu te mau faaararaa i te mau hi'opo'araa e te mau ohipa rû.
permissions.notificationsBody: E faaohipa noa matou i te mau faaararaa no te mau faaararaa no te parururaa, no te mau faananearaa rû, e no te mau faahaamana'oraa ta outou e faati'a.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: E tape'a maitai te vahi i te vahi parururaa
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: E faaohipa VeryLoving i to outou vahi no te hoho'a fenua parururaa, te mau vahi atâta, te faaiteraa vitiviti e te SOS i te mau mea atoa. E nehenehe ta outou e taui i te reira i muri a'e i roto i te Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleTitle: E titauhia te mau faaararaa no te parururaa
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e hapono te reira i te mau faahaamana'oraa no te tapa'oraa i roto i te fare, te mau faaararaa rû e te mau faaararaa no te parururaa ta outou e faati'a. Aita matou e faaohipa nei i te mau faaararaa no te mau parau faatianiani.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Na te micro e faatere i te mau niuniu paruru
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e faaohipa noa outou i ta outou micro ia haamata ana'e outou i te hoê AI hoa e aore râ, i te hoê niuniu paruru.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth tu'ati i ta outou tauihaa
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: E faaohipa VeryLoving i te Bluetooth no te apiti atu i te NorthStar piru, no te tai'o i te huru o te tu'atiraa, e no te faatupu i te parururaa mai roto mai i te tao'a oomo.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving e faaohipa oia i te pata hoho'a ia ma'iti ana'e outou i te pata i te hoê hoho'a e aore râ, ia faaite i te hoê hoho'a paruru.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving e roaa teie tereraa i roto i te Settings e te dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceTitle: A ma'iti i to outou reo
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: A ma'iti i te reo o te hoa o te mana'o papû a'e ia faaroo.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Te hi'opo'araa hau no te parururaa i te mau mahana atoa.
tutorial.guardianSubtitle: A faaite i te mau parau tapiri i te mau taata ti'aturihia.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: E pae pataraa e nehenehe e faarahi atu i te mau faaararaa no te SOS e no te tia'i.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: A faatupu i te hoê tumu maitai no te faaru'e i te hoê huru tupuraa au ore.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: A haamata i te hoê niuniu hoa i te taime mau ia hinaaro ana'e outou i te tauturu.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: A tamata i te mau taheraa parururaa i roto i te hoê faahi'oraa ha'iha'i.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: A tuu i te mau piru i piha'i iho ia hi'opo'a ana'e outou.
jewelry.scan: A hi'opo'a i te mau matini
jewelry.scanning: Te hi'opo'araa i piha'i iho mai...
jewelry.noDevices: Aita â te mau matini NorthStar i itehia mai.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Aita Bluetooth hi'opo'araa i nehenehe e haamata. A tamata faahou.
jewelry.scanFailed: Aita matou i ite i te mau piru i pihai iho mai. A hi'o Bluetooth, a tape'a NorthStar i piha'i iho e a tamata faahou.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Aita Bluetooth hi'opo'araa i nehenehe e haamata. A hi'Bluetooth i te rave'a e a tamata faahou.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Aita te mau matini i piha'i iho i te matini i piha'i iho mai. A faati'a Bluetooth ia tomo i roto i te Settings, i muri iho a tamata faahou.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar mea maoro roa no te tu'ati. A haafatata i te reira e a tamata faahou.
jewelry.connectFailed: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia tu'ati i te NorthStar. A hi'opo'a e, ua î anei te reira e tei piha'i iho mai, i muri iho a tamata faahou.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Aita â e matini i piha'i iho
jewelry.emptyMessage: A faaî noa i te NorthStar e i piha'i iho i teie niuniu, e i muri iho, a pata faahou.
jewelry.searchingMessage: Te imi ra i te mau matini NorthStar piha'i iho mai...

home.subtitle: Tapura no te paruru
home.readyBody: Te reo, te hoho'a fenua, te piru e te mau tia'i.

map.finding: Te imiraa i to outou vahi...
map.title: Hoho'a fenua parururaa
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go hi'opo'araa ; Mapbox e renders i roto i te hoê development build.
map.updateFailed: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia faananea i to outou vahi. A tamata faahou.
map.notRequested: Aita i anihia ia haere i te vahi. E nehenehe ta outou e faati'a i te reira i muri a'e mai roto mai i te Settings.
map.permissionOff: Aita te tomoraa i te vahi e vai ra. A tuu i te reira i roto i te Settings no te faatumu i te hoho'a fenua parururaa i ni'a ia outou.
map.timeout: E mea maoro a'e to outou vahi i mana'ohia. A haere i te hoê vahi e te hoê tapa'o maramarama a'e e a tamata faahou.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Aita â te mau vahi i faahereherehia
map.savedEmptyMessage: E itehia te mau vahi ti'aturihia ta outou e faaherehere i ô nei no te hi'opo'a vitiviti.

zones.crowding: Ua rahi roa te taata i te maororaa pô

safetyCall.offlineCompanion: Hoa i ni'a i te itenati
safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Te tu'atiraa papû i to outou hoa reo...

messagesWaiting.one: %{count} poro'i e tia'i ra ia haponohia
messagesWaiting.other: %{count} mau poro'i e tia'i ra i te haponohia

safetyCall.useOffline: A faaohipa i te hoa i ni'a i te itenati
safetyCall.reconnect: A tu'ati faahou i te reo AI
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: A patapata mai te mea e mea fifi ia paraparau
safetyCall.emptyTitle: E haamata ta outou aparauraa i ô nei
safetyCall.emptyMessage: A haamata i te niuniu e aore râ a patapata i te hoê poro'i ia ineine ana'e outou.

chat.retryAccessibility: Tamata faahou i te hapono i te poro'i

history.clearTitle: E mea maramarama maitai te aamu o te aparauraa ?
history.clearMessage: E iriti te reira i te mau parau poro'i AI te mau apiti tei faahereherehia mai roto mai i teie matini.
history.cannotUndo: Eita te reira e nehenehe e tatarahia.
history.title: Aamu o te aparauraa
history.subtitle: AI te mau parau poro'i tei faahereherehia i ni'a i teie matini.
history.empty: Aita â te mau aparauraa i faahereherehia.
history.emptyMessage: E itehia ta outou mau aparauraa AI te mau hoa i ô nei i muri a'e i to outou niuniu matamua.
history.loadFailed: Aita ta matou e nehenehe e faaî i te aamu o te aparauraa. A tamata faahou.
history.clearFailed: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia haamaramarama i te aamu o te aparauraa. A tamata faahou.
history.deleteFailed: Eita ta matou e nehenehe e tumâ i taua aparauraa ra. A tamata faahou.

voices.title: To'u mau reo no te paruru
voices.subtitle: A ma'iti i te reo apiti o te mana'o e mea tano ia faaroo.
voices.selectionFailedMessage: A tamata faahou i te ma'iti i te reo.
voices.sampleFailedTitle: Aita e vai ra te hoho'a
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Aita i nehenehe e ha'uti i teie hoho'a reo. A tamata faahou.

capybara.name: Capybear
capybara.description: te mărû, te hau, te niu

bestie.name: Te hoa maitai roa a'e
bestie.description: te maramarama, te tamahanahana, te aparauraa

boyfriend.name: Hoa tamaroa
boyfriend.description: te aueue ore, te here, te vai ra

muscleMan.name: Taata uaua
muscleMan.description: te ti'aturi, te paruru, te faaitoitoraa

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: A faaohipa i te mau pahonoraa a te hoa ia ore ana'e te faanahoraa e aore râ te Hume parau faati'a e roaa.
settings.privacyData: Te oraraa o te taata iho e te mau haamaramaramaraa
settings.privacyBody: A hapono e aore râ a tumâ i te mau haamaramaramaraa no te fenua iho tei haaputuhia i ni'a i teie matini.
settings.preparingExport: Te faaineineraa i te hooraa i te tauihaa...
settings.privacyPolicy: Ture no te paruru i te taata
settings.deleteAll: Tumâ i te mau haamaramaramaraa atoa o te fenua iho
settings.emergencyContacts: Te mau taata e farerei nei i te mau ohipa rû
settings.exportFailedMessage: Aita e nehenehe e hapono i ta outou mau haamaramaramaraa i teie nei.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Tumâ i te mau haamaramaramaraa atoa no te fenua iho ?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: E iriti te reira i to outou hoho'a, te mau faanahoraa, te mau niuniu rû, te aamu o te aparauraa, te mau faahaamana'oraa parau faati'a, e te tuhaa haapapûraa i ni'a i teie matini.
settings.deleteEverything: Tumâ i te mau mea atoa
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Aita e nehenehe e tumâ i te mau haamaramaramaraa o te fenua iho i teie nei.
settings.linkFailed: Aita e nehenehe e iriti i te hono

sections.languageSubtitle: Interface e te parau faati'a no te faanahoraa
sections.companionSubtitle: Te reo e te mau mea e au a'e i ni'a i te iten
sections.deviceSafety: Te mau matini e te parururaa
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, te mau tia'i, e te mau taata rû
sections.privacy: Te oraraa o te taata iho e te mau haamaramaramaraa
sections.privacySubtitle: Te aamu, te haponoraa, te tumâraa, e te faatureraa
sections.accountSubtitle: Ta outou tuhaa pureraa no te VeryLoving i teie nei

settings.updateFailedMessage: Eita ta matou e nehenehe e faaherehere i taua mana'o ra. A tamata faahou.
settings.signOutFailedTitle: Aita i nehenehe e tapa'o i rapae
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Te tere noa ra ta outou tuhaa haapiiraa. A tamata faahou.

contacts.title: Te mau taata e farerei nei i te mau ohipa rû
contacts.subtitle: Te vai ra te mau taata ti'aturihia i roto i te mau tereraa parururaa.
contacts.addTitle: A tuu i te hoê niuniu rû
contacts.name: I'oa
contacts.empty: Aita â te mau niuniu rû i tuuhia mai.
contacts.emptyMessage: A tuu mai i te hoê taata ta outou e ti'aturi ia ineine oia ia hinaaro ana'e te hoê vahi parururaa.
contacts.removeMessage: Eita teie taata e fâ faahou mai i roto i ta outou reni rû.
contacts.nameRequired: A papa'i i te i'oa o te taata e farerei ra.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia faaherehere i teie farereiraa. A hi'opo'a i te mau haamaramaramaraa e a tamata faahou.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia iriti i teie niuniu. A tamata faahou.

device.title: Faatereraa i te mau matini
device.subtitle: A faatere i ta outou matini NorthStar.

friends.title: Te mau hoa
friends.subtitle: Te mau tia'i, te mau aniraa, e te hoho'a no te mau ohipa rû.
friends.emptyTitle: Aita e taata i roto i ta outou haamenemeneraa paruru
friends.emptyMessage: E itehia te mau hoa e te mau tia'i ti'aturihia i ô nei ia amuihia mai ratou.

emergency.title: Te mau SOS rû
emergency.subtitle: A faarahi noa i te reira mai te peu e e hinaaro oioi outou i te tauturu.
emergency.body: Na te reira e faaara i to outou tereraa no te parururaa e e faaineine i te mau niuniu rû.
emergency.notificationBody: Ua ineine ta outou tereraa rû.
emergency.addContact: A tuu i te hoê niuniu rû i roto i te Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Ua ineine te tumu parau no te opereraa i te vahi. A tu'ati i te hopea o te backend share no te hapono i te mau hono ora.

capybearTap.title: Capybear pata
capybearTap.subtitle: A pata piti i to outou NorthStar no te tuu i te hoê anani paruru.
capybearTap.body: Ua ineine te e'a no te niuniu i te ohipa BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Mai te mea ra e, aita oe i itenati. E haponohia'tu ta outou parau poro'i ia tu'ati faahou outou.
errors.voiceQueued: Ua faahereherehia te poro'i. E haponohia'tu te reira ia tu'ati faahou te hoa reo.
errors.voiceRetrying: Te tamata nei au i te hapono faahou i ta outou poro'i...
errors.voiceConnecting: Te tu'atiraa papû i to outou hoa reo...
errors.microphone: E titauhia te micro no te mau niuniu reo. E nehenehe ta outou e faaohipa i te reira i roto i te Settings, e aore râ, e patapata i te hoê poro'i.
errors.billing: Aita e vai ra te reta reo i ni'a i te itenati no te hoê taime. E nehenehe ta outou e tamau noa e te hoa i ni'a i te itenati.
errors.authentication: Aita i ti'a i te hoa reo ia hi'opo'a i teie tuhaa haapiiraa. A tomo faahou i roto e aore râ a faaohipa i te hoa i ni'a i te itenati no teie taime.
errors.timeout: Ua maoro roa te hoa reo no te pahono mai. A hi'opo'a i to outou tuatiraa e a tamata faahou.
errors.network: Aita i roaa ia matou te hoa reo. A hi'opo'a i ta outou tuatiraa, i muri iho a tamata faahou e aore râ, a tamau noa i te haere i rapae i te reni.
errors.genericVoice: Ua tâpû te tahi mea i te piiraa reo. A tamata faahou, e aore râ, a tamau noa e te hoa i ni'a i te itenati.

privacy.exportTitle: VeryLoving haponoraa i te mau haamaramaramaraa

notifications.channelName: Te mau faaararaa no te parururaa

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: E hinaaro VeryLoving i te micro no te paruru e no te AI i te mau niuniu.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: E faaohipa VeryLoving i to outou vahi no te hoho'a fenua parururaa e te mau rave'a parururaa i piha'i iho mai.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: E faaohipa VeryLoving i te Bluetooth no te tuati i ta outou mau tao'a NorthStar no te parururaa.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Aita teie rāveʻa tomoraʻa e vai nei i roto i teie hamaniraʻa.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Haere noa mai te demo (no te faahoturaa anaʻe)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: E faaohipa te huru demo i te mau haamaramaramaraa haavarevare o te matini anaʻe. Aita te mau taviniraa tuihia i haapapuhia, e e haamata faahou teie tuhaa ia uta-faahou-hia te faanahoraa.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Aita te numera haapapuraa i tano aore ra ua pau. A ani i te hoê numera apî e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Ua rahi roa te mau tamataraa tomoraʻa. A tiai maa taime, e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ua maoro roa te haapapuraa tomoraʻa. A hiʻopoa i ta oe natiraa e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia farerei i te taviniraa tomoraʻa. A hiʻopoa i ta oe natiraa e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Ua pau ta oe tuhaa. A tomo faahou.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Aita te hohoʻa fenua parururaa i nehenehe e uta. A hiʻopoa i ta oe natiraa e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Aita te vairaa ora e vai nei. Te faaitehia nei to oe vairaa hopea i haaputuhia mai %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia faaite i to oe vairaa. A hiʻopoa i te faatiaraa vairaa e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Teie toʻu vairaa i tapaohia i %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Teie toʻu vairaa hopea i haaputuhia, i tapaohia i %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Ua tupohehia te tomoraa Bluetooth. A faatupu i te reira i roto i te Mau faanahoraa, e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Ua tupohehia Bluetooth. A faatupu i te reira, e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Aita te taairaa Bluetooth e vai nei i nia i teie matini aore ra teie hamaniraʻa.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia ite ia NorthStar. A vaiiho piri noa, a hiʻopoa i te Bluetooth, e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Aita e matini NorthStar piri i itehia. A vaiiho piri noa e a imi faahou.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia taai atu ia NorthStar. A tapea ia na te uira e te piri, e a tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Aita i nehenehe ia matou ia haaputu i teie vairaa. A tamata faahou.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Ua matara te niuniu; aita te piiraa i haapapuhia.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Ua faaorehia; aita e piiraa i ravehia.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Aita e taata farereiraa rū i vai; aita e piiraa i ravehia.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Aita te niuniu i nehenehe e matara; aita e piiraa i ravehia.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Aita te tamataraa SOS hopea i nehenehe e haapapuhia.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Aita te hoa reo e vai nei i teie taime. A tamata faahou a muri aʻe aore ra a haere noa e te hoa tuimotu.
releaseCritical.editContactTitle: Faahuru ê i te taata farereiraa rū
releaseCritical.contactUpdated: Ua faatitiaifarohia te taata farereiraa rū.
